personas.name: Aspiring Influencers

personas.name: Social Media Enthusiasts
personas.description: Users who are keenly interested in the trends and dynamics of social media platforms, particularly how individuals gain popularity and influence.

personas.name: Academic Researchers
personas.description: Scholars and students studying media, communication, or sociology who are interested in the cultural and economic impacts of social media and influencer culture.
